---
title: "STAT Capstone Report"
output: html_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

## Overview

This report runs the modular R analysis pipeline and presents key model outputs.

```{r load-modules}
source("00_project_setup.R")
source("01_data_prep.R")
source("02_audit_vif_main.R")
source("03_interaction_models.R")
source("04_body_composition_models.R")
source("05_race_income_models_modular.R")

data <- prepare_data()
design <- make_design(data)
```

## 1) Missingness, VIF, and Main Effects

```{r main-effects}
main_res <- run_audit_vif_main(data, design, make_plots = TRUE)
```

## 2) Interaction Models

```{r interaction-models}
int_res <- run_interaction_models(data, design)
```

## 3) Body Composition Models

```{r body-composition}
body_res <- run_body_composition_models(data)
```

## 4) Race + Income Adjusted Models

```{r race-income}
race_income_res <- run_race_income_models(data, design)
```

## Notes

- Core analysis scripts are kept as modular `.R` files for reuse and debugging.
- This `.Rmd` is the presentation/report layer that executes those modules.
